MINI MINUTES FOR JAN-09-2017 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 501

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT THE MOSSER COMPANIES, INC.'S, MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. MOVING PARTY FAILED TO SHIFT ITS BURDEN. MOVING PARTY FAILS TO PRESENT ANY FACTS OR LAW FOR THE PROPOSITION THAT THE PAYMENT DUE UNDER THE AGREEMENT WAS SUBJECT TO SET-OFFS OR DEDUCTIONS; OR THAT A MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT MAY BE GRANTED ON THE BASIS OF LACK OF DAMAGES DUE TO A PAYMENT MADE WHERE THE PAYMENT IS MADE 6 MONTHS AFTER THE FILING OF THE COMPLAINT AND 3 DAYS BEFORE THE FILING OF THE MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED (D501)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-06-2017 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-06-2017 Judgment Entered

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Motion For Summary Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-09-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT THE MOSSER COMPANIES, INC.'s, MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is DENIED. Moving party failed to shift its burden. Moving party fails to present any facts or law for the proposition that the payment due under the Agreement was subject to set-offs or deductions; or that a motion for summary judgment may be granted on the basis of lack of damages due to a payment made where the payment is made 6 months after the filing of the complaint and 3 days before the filing of the motion for summary judgment. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported (D501)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Motion For Summary Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-06-2017 Continued To Jan-09-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
